Due to extraordinary order volume this year, we are placing the following temporary fulfillment times on all orders placed. Additionally, we will not be accepting Rush Orders until further notice.

• Orders for starter sets and outfits: Up to 2 to 4 weeks or sooner if possible.

• Orders for rocket kits: Up to 2 to 4 weeks or sooner if possible.

• Orders for RMS™ rocket motor hardware: Up to 6 to 12 weeks or sooner if possible.

• Orders for “A” type to “G” type rocket motors: Up to 6 to 8 weeks or sooner if possible.

• Orders for 29-38mm RMS reloads and DMS motors: Up to 16 to 20 weeks or sooner if possible.

• Orders for 54-152mm RMS reloads and DMS motors: Up to 40 to 44 weeks or sooner if possible.

NOTE: If inventory is available, all orders will be filled as quickly as possible.

Orders for rocket motors for specific major launch events need to indicate the launch event they are required for and the date they need to be received by.  The stated order fulfillment times listed above MUST BE taken into consideration when ordering rocket motors for specific launch events.  We are currently NOT accepting Rush Orders.

Our overall business has increased tremendously over the past year and we are working very hard to catch up, including making huge investments in new capital equipment and personnel.  The Industrial Solid Propulsion (ISP) side of our b
